column1: # Manual features template — use this if cbbpy scraping fails during tournament week.
#   1. Fill in one row per tournament team (68 teams for the full field
#   team               — Full team name exactly as used in bracket file (e.g. "Duke Blue Devils")
#   seed               — Tournament seed 1-16 (leave blank for non-tournament teams)
#   adj_margin         — Adjusted point margin per game (Massey-style
#                        Typical range: -15 (bad) to +30 (elite). Seed 1 teams average ~22

column3: or ESPN BPI adjusted efficiency margin.

column1: #   win_pct            — Season win percentage (0.0–1.0).  e.g. 0.882 = 30-4 record.
#   sos_win_pct        — Opponents' average win percentage (strength of schedule proxy
#                        D-I average is ~0.50; power-conference teams typically 0.52–0.58.
#   form_rating        — Late-season form index (typically -1.0 to +1.0; 0.0 is neutral).
#                        Positive = team improving/hot; negative = cooling off.

column2: use 0.0 (neutral — this feature has low weight).

column1: # QUICK REFERENCE — typical values by seed:
#   - KenPom (kenpom.com)      — best source for adj_margin (KenPom adjusted efficiency margin)
#   - ESPN BPI                 — available on team pages under "Advanced Stats"
#   - Sports-Reference CBB     — win_pct and schedule strength (SRS ≈ adj_margin)
